## Preserved prior README notes

<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README START -->
# SANSTests

This folder contains Lean answer evidence for the Schema A New System
control.

The modules mirror the public answer-key role of `SchemaTests/`: they
provide the local kernel, accepted method witnesses, rejected method
counterexamples where applicable, and the consolidated answer-key file.

Use this folder when auditing the matched non-duplicating control for
Schema A. The public answer key cites these modules only where they
directly support a benchmark answer row. Broader comparisons between the
duplicating and non-duplicating systems are handled in the paper and
analytics outputs, not by adding theory-only Lean modules to this export.
<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README END -->
